title: Risk of Rain Mobs
description: This mod brings mobs from the Risk of Rain universe into Minecraft!
body:
![Mod banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/aecdd04dab6a8d013489a797fa744863125d87b6.jpeg) ### About This mod brings mobs from the Risk of Rain universe into Minecraft! ### Enemies
![Lemurian](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c7815beadb70f3cfd651ef39d0d0832331dc1069.png)
**Lemurian** attack by spitting fireballs at the player. If the distance between the Lemurian and his target is short, the Lemurian run straight toward the target and proceed to do a melee attack.
![Stone Golem](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f53e9e56fc41b34ab76d1cca59518d2a7a83e4b8.png)
**Stone Golem** uses a slow charging laser attack from its eye that can track his target. At close range, the Stone Golem can use its fists by slamming them together.
![Beetle](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/97f1320070ce28e0f04261a68354698fef44edf0.png)
A **Beetle**'s only attack is to headbutt a target. They hop around aimlessly until spotting a player. _Pixel art by Kanj_
![Wisp](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2fec3e368ed8b39613d3324dff4907c401d0f0cb.png)
Characterized by their constant flame, the **Wisps** are not living beings. Each Wisp has a mask in the center, where all the fire erupts from. The Wisps are able to concentrate their heat into a long range heat blast. ### Allies
![Gunner Drone](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bb776fb943af614b5f4de721b79ca58a7b69e3df.png)
Once purchased with gold, **Gunner Drone** follows it's owner from a close distance and shoots targets. It fires 4 shots in quick succession. This skill has a cooldown of 2 seconds. If he is smoking from damage, you can repair it with iron.
![Gunner Turret](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0f5b65eaecc471ecc4534c31bca90f3a8b26a7d9.png)
The **Gunner Turret** is a drone that supports the player with more firepower, at the cost of being unable to move freely. It fires 40 shots and reloads for 2 seconds. _Pixel art by Kanj_
